name: Yotpo
description:
__POSSIBLE_UNTRANSLATED__

What Yotpo Does?

Yotpo's review generator guarantees that they help you rank better on SERPs, make you more prominent on Google Search and help with collecting reviews in an efficient way. To do this, it also makes use of various advanced tools such as smart prompts, customised questions and SMS review requests.

Source: G2

Features:

  • Send personalized review requests to customers at optimal times.
  • Collect reviews from various channels such as websites, email, and social media.
  • Send reminders to customers who haven't left reviews yet.
  • Seamless integration with e-commerce platforms like Shopify, Magento, etc.
  • Provide analytics to track review performance and customer sentiment.
  • Allows customers to easily share their reviews on social media platforms.

Benefits:

  • Increase the number of positive reviews and manage negative feedback effectively.
  • User-generated content (reviews) can improve search engine rankings.
  • Positive reviews can influence purchasing decisions and boost sales.
  • Engage with customers through reviews, improving loyalty and trust.
  • Use analytics to make informed business decisions based on customer feedback.
  • Leverage advanced tools such as smart prompts, custom questions, and SMS review requests to collect higher quality content.

Pros

✅ Integrations are seamless, and it is extremely easy to use

✅ Great for asking your audience the right kind of questions

Cons

❌ The platform is known to be extremely glitchy.

❌ Users complaint that it is not fairly priced and does not provide the "value for money" service.

‍

Priced at $79 Per Month

‍
